docs.title: Welcome to the fitness-tracker
docs.text: This is the main page for the fitness-tracker project documentation.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Here you will find all the necessary information about the project.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: To get started, follow the instructions in the sections below.

docs.title: Issue: Google Drive not mounting / signing in on macOS Ventura 13.3
Fix
docs.text:
• hit Command + Shift + G, to open a Go to Folder window
  • copy and paste path: ~/Library/Application Support/ and hit Enter / Click the Go button
  • inside the Application Supporter dir, navigate to the Google dir
  • move the DriveFS dir to the bin / trash
  • empty bin / trash and restart computer

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
You can analyze your weight training workouts both in term of 1RM, or volume. See examples for each type of analysis below.

Data and analysis for athlete: gustav_rasmussen

VO2-Max: 55.21923 mL/kg/min

docs.title: Frequency
docs.text: Below: Annual weekly workout frequency. Each figure displays week vs number of workouts during that week.

docs.title: STRENGTH
docs.text: Each figure displays workout-date vs 1-rep-max estimate for different training programs, together with their regression fits/trendlines using 68 % confidence intervals. (Each program is shown in the legend)
